test_cases.title: session_before_compact returns compaction result when segments >= 3
test_cases.description: Verify that when segments >= 3, the handler executes tree-compact and returns a valid CompactionResult with summary, firstKeptEntryId, and tokensBefore
steps: Setup: Create session with 3+ segments, trigger compact threshold
Verify session_before_compact handler returns { compaction: { summary, firstKeptEntryId, tokensBefore } }
Verify tree is updated (compactor.getTree() returns new tree)

test_cases.title: No repeated compact trigger after successful tree-compact
test_cases.description: After tree-compact succeeds, next prompt should not trigger _runAutoCompaction

test_cases.title: Compression blocks conversation flow (sync await)
test_cases.description: During tree-compact, no LLM request should be sent until compression completes
steps: Verify no LLM streaming starts before compression completes
Verify agent continues after compression ends

test_cases.title: TUI renders compression status during async spawn
test_cases.description: Compression status (ic-compact-start/end bubbles, footer status) renders correctly
steps: Verify footer shows 'IC compressing N segments...'
After completion, verify ic-compact-end bubble appears

test_cases.title: context handler does not call shouldCompress
test_cases.description: Code review: createContextHandler does not reference needsCompressionRef or call shouldCompress

test_cases.title: turn_end handler does not trigger compression
test_cases.description: Code review: createTurnEndHandler does not call compressAsync

test_cases.title: Segments < 3 falls through to Pi native compact
test_cases.description: When segments are insufficient, handler returns cancel:false and Pi executes native LLM compact
steps: Setup: Create session with < 3 segments, trigger compact threshold

test_cases.title: Tree-compact failure falls through to Pi native compact
test_cases.description: When tree-compact fails (fallbackUsed with errorReason), handler returns cancel:false
steps: Setup: Mock or force tree-compact to fail
Verify Pi executes native compact as fallback
